missingEdge: The accepted SOT three-layer contract chain names an independent CVF Refinery layer (SourceEnvelope/RefineryPacket producer). SOT3-T3 built this as a deterministic local package (`RefineryEngine.run`, `REQUIRED_STAGE_CHAIN`); SOT3-T6 proved it executes as a real dependency inside the three-layer vertical slice.

citations.evidenceRole: reviewer-accepted NEW_OWNER_CANDIDATE disposition (superseded by T3/T6 owner creation)
reviewer acceptance of the Refinery Core package as deterministic runtime owner
reviewer acceptance that `RefineryEngine.run` executes as a real dependency, not a mock, inside the accepted vertical slice

impact: Was: blocked any as-built claim that CVF has an independent Refinery layer. Now: the layer has a private-provenance runtime owner; remaining impact is limited to activation, adapter, provider/live, and public-sync claims, none of which this GAP closure asserts.

closeCondition.conditionText: SATISFIED: `docs/reviews/CVF_SOT3_T3_COMPLETION_REVIEW_2026-07-12.md` accepts the Refinery Core package as owner; `docs/reviews/CVF_SOT3_T6_COMPLETION_REVIEW_2026-07-13.md` accepts real-instance execution.

reopenCondition.conditionText: Reopen only if a future review finds the `EXTENSIONS/CVF_REFINERY/` owner path removed, superseded, or materially non-functional, or if an operator authorizes package activation/adapter/provider work that changes this GAP's boundary.

actionOwner: SOT3-T7 semantic value audit and closeout
boundaryCaveat: Does not claim package activation, an execution adapter, provider/live proof, public-sync readiness, or production readiness. Does not claim the Refinery-to-Kernel packet-binding hash is an owner-level shared contract (see the separately tracked packet-binding-hash GAP disposition). Private-provenance implementation only.
